enonce.texte:
Exercise 1: Vocabulary - Introducing Oneself

Complete the sentences with the correct words to introduce yourself.
images: A friendly cartoon of a young African boy or girl waving and smiling, ready to introduce themselves.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 2: Verb to be - Present Tense

Complete the sentences with the correct form of the verb "to be" (am, is, are).

Exercise 3: Articles a/an

Choose the correct article (a or an) to complete the sentences.

Exercise 4: Reading - A Self Introduction

Read the text below and answer the questions.

Hello! My name is Amina. I am 10 years old. I am a student in Class Six. I am from Yaoundé. I love reading and singing. My favorite subject is English.
images: A young African girl in a school uniform holding a book and smiling.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 5: Writing - Introduce Yourself

Write a short paragraph introducing yourself. Include your name, age, class, and something you like. Use the expressions you learned (My name is..., I am... years old, I am in Class..., I like...).
images: A simple illustration of a student writing in a notebook.

questions.texte: Write a short self-introduction paragraph (4-5 sentences).
questions.reponse: Example Answer: My name is Jean. I am 11 years old. I am in Class Six. I am from Douala. I like playing football and reading books. My favorite subject is Maths.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 6: Oral Activity - Role Play

Work in pairs. Imagine you are new at school. Introduce yourself to your classmate. Ask each other questions. Use the expressions below.

  • My name is...
  • I am... years old.
  • I am in Class...
  • I am from...
  • I like...
  • What is your name?
  • How old are you?
  • What do you like?
images: Two young African students greeting each other and talking.

questions.texte: Prepare a short dialogue with your partner for the role play.
questions.reponse:
Example Dialogue:

Student A: Hello! My name is Marie. What is your name?

Student B: Hi, Marie! I am Kofi.

Student A: How old are you, Kofi?

Student B: I am 10 years old. And you?

Student A: I am 10 years old too. I am in Class Six. What about you?

Student B: I am also in Class Six. I like playing football. What do you like?

Student A: I like singing and dancing. Nice to meet you!

Student B: Nice to meet you too!

enonce.texte:
Exercise 7: Listening and Completing - Self Introduction

Listen to the teacher (or audio) and complete the sentences. (The teacher will read aloud the self-introductions in the box below.)

(Teacher's script: "Hello! My name is Amina. I am 10 years old. I am in Class Six. I like reading. Hello! My name is Jean. I am 11 years old. I am in Class Six. I like football.")
images: An illustration of a child listening to a recording with headphones.

questions.texte: Complete the sentences for Amina: My name is __________. I am __________ years old. I am in Class __________. I like __________.
Complete the sentences for Jean: My name is __________. I am __________ years old. I am in Class __________. I like __________.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 8: Reordering Sentences

Put the words in the correct order to form a sentence that introduces yourself.

intitule: Interview a Friend - Describing Another Person

enonce.texte:
Exercise 9: Interview a Friend

Ask a friend or family member to introduce themselves. Write their introduction in the space below. Include their name, age, class, and something they like.
images: A simple drawing of two friends talking.

questions.reponse: Example Answer: My friend's name is Marie. She is 10 years old. She is in Class Six. She likes reading and singing.

intitule: Creative Writing - Introducing a Family Member

enonce.texte:
Exercise 10: Introducing a Family Member

Write a short paragraph introducing a family member (mother, father, brother, or sister). Include their name, age, job (if applicable), and something they like.
images: An illustration of a child with their family.

questions.texte: Write a self-introduction of your family member.
questions.reponse: Example Answer: This is my mother. Her name is Awa. She is 35 years old. She is a teacher. She likes cooking and reading.
